steps.title: Identify what juxtaposition the claim describes
steps.content: The underlined portion claims the novel juxtaposes (combines side by side) literary realism with Polish folklore elements—this specific combination is what makes it resemble magical realist novels.

steps.title: Find the quotation that captures both elements
steps.content:
Choice B — "While *Primeval and Other Times* alternates between realistic and antirealistic modes of representation, details suggesting the influence of Polish folklore nevertheless occur throughout the novel." supports the claim by explicitly describing both elements: the novel alternates between realistic and antirealistic modes of representation, with Polish folklore details...occurring throughout.

The other three choices either omit one component, pivot to Latin American influence, or describe disruption instead of juxtaposition.

That matches Choice B — "While *Primeval and Other Times* alternates between realistic and antirealistic modes of representation, details suggesting the influence of Polish folklore nevertheless occur throughout the novel.".
